title: Preserve Standard Stage Topology And Path Invariants
forbids: standard recipe stage directory drift from the contract manifest/runtime recipe, missing stage entrypoints, or retired stage directories
why: The standard MapGen pipeline file tree must stay closed around active stages derived from the contract manifest and runtime recipe; source-order and step parity checks are owned by separate rules.
message: Update the standard contract manifest, runtime recipe, and stage-root topology together; shared support hubs are allowed but are not active stage ids.
